description_long: This is a digital representation of an adult pedestrian with a youthful appearance, featuring a medium build and average height. The individual is dressed in a casual short-sleeve t-shirt with printed text on both the front and back, paired with fitted pants and low-top sneakers. The t-shirt fits comfortably and the pants are straight-cut, giving a relaxed urban look suitable for city environments. The figure's arms are slightly bent and relaxed at the sides, and the hands are open with fingers naturally extended. The hairstyle is medium-length and straight, with the hair parted and tucked behind the ears. The overall appearance is clean and modern, making this figure appropriate for contemporary urban scenes.
description: A casually dressed adult pedestrian with a medium build, wearing a short-sleeve t-shirt, fitted pants, and sneakers, and sporting medium-length straight hair.
description_view_0: Front view shows the person's facial features, t-shirt with front text, relaxed arms, and full view of the sneakers.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the straight cut of the pants, and the side silhouette of the sneakers.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, the t-shirt with large printed text on the back, and the back of the shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, arm, and leg alignment, as well as the side of the sneakers.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeve t-shirt and fitted pants
